namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<int?> Nullable_Int32 => __Nullable_Int32 ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Nullable_Int32, __Create_Nullable_Int32());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<int?>? __Nullable_Int32;

        #pragma warning disable CS8622 // Nullability warning for out parameter mismatch
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<int?> __Create_Nullable_Int32()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenOptionalTypeShape<int?, int>
            {
                ElementTypeFactory = () => Int32,
                NoneConstructor = static () => null,
                SomeConstructor = static t => t,
                Deconstructor = static (int? optional, out int element) => { if (optional is null) { element = default!; return false; } else { element = optional.Value; return true; } },
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
        #pragma warning restore CS8767
    }
